overview: Handle the standard new-message workflow in Thunderbird: open a fresh composer, fill the headers and body, apply visible formatting when required, and send the message.
when_to_use: Use this skill for fresh outgoing emails rather than replies, forwards, or draft edits.
This skill ends when the compose window is ready to send or the send action is executed.
preconditions: Thunderbird is open on the Mail surface or can be returned to from the current window.
The requested mailbox, account, sender, recipient, or folder name from the task is already known.

atomic_capabilities.name: open_new_message
atomic_capabilities.purpose: Open a fresh compose window and fill the message headers.

atomic_capabilities.name: format_body
atomic_capabilities.purpose: Apply visible compose formatting before sending.

decision_guide.condition: no compose window is open yet
decision_guide.reason: Start from the Mail toolbar so the new composer is opened on the intended account surface.

decision_guide.condition: the body already exists and only visual formatting must change
decision_guide.reason: Work from the active compose window and verify the formatting in the visible editor before sending.

procedures.procedure_name: Open a new message, fill content, and send it
when_to_use: The task starts from a fresh outgoing message rather than a reply or draft.

states.visual_grounding: Thunderbird Mail shows the New Message control that opens a fresh composer.
states.trigger_condition: A new outgoing message is required and no compose window is open yet.
states.action: Click New Message to open the composer on the current mail account.
states.text_description: Thunderbird Mail shows the New Message control that opens a fresh composer.

highlight_targets.name: New Message button
highlight_targets.annotation_query: New Message button in Thunderbird mail toolbar

states.visual_grounding: The compose window shows the recipient and subject fields ready for the requested message content.
states.trigger_condition: The compose window is already open and ready for the main message text.
states.action: Fill the To and Subject fields, then enter the requested body content and visible formatting.
states.text_description: The compose window shows the recipient and subject fields ready for the requested message content.

highlight_targets.name: Subject field
highlight_targets.annotation_query: Subject field in Thunderbird compose window

highlight_targets.name: recipient field
highlight_targets.annotation_query: recipient field populated in Thunderbird compose window

states.visual_grounding: The compose toolbar shows Send while the requested content and formatting are already visible in the editor.
states.trigger_condition: All requested content and formatting have already been entered.
states.action: Send the email only after the compose window visibly matches the requested message content.
states.text_description: The compose toolbar shows Send while the requested content and formatting are already visible in the editor.

highlight_targets.name: Send button
highlight_targets.annotation_query: Send button in Thunderbird compose toolbar

highlight_targets.name: formatted message body
highlight_targets.annotation_query: formatted message body in Thunderbird compose window

common_failure_modes: Opening a reply or draft flow instead of a fresh message window.
Sending before the visible body formatting matches the task.
codex_rewrite_note: Retained from the existing Codex-authored Thunderbird source library for the 2026-04-18 Codex refinement pass.
